question: 'North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars', 'Kurnool', और 'South Andamans' नामक जिलों के लिए जिले का नाम और उप-जिला आईडी की संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, उन्हें उनके जिले के नाम के अनुसार समूहित (group) करें और उप-जिला आईडी की संख्या के घटते क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें, केवल शीर्ष 5 परिणाम दिखाएं।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars', 'Kurnool', 'South Andamans') GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT d.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID) AS SUB_DISTRICT_COUNT
FROM DIM_DISTRICT d
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON d.DISTRICT_ID = sd.DISTRICT_ID
WHERE d.DISTRICT_NAME IN ('North And Middle Andaman', 'West Godavari', 'Nicobars', 'Kurnool', 'South Andamans')
GROUP BY d.DISTRICT_NAME
ORDER BY SUB_DISTRICT_COUNT DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:

question: आंध्र प्रदेश राज्य के लिए, प्रत्येक जिले का नाम और प्रसूति एवं बाल कल्याण केंद्रों की कुल संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, कुल संख्या के आधार पर अवरोही क्रम (descending order) में व्यवस्थित करें, और केवल शीर्ष 5 जिले दिखाएं।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE AS T3 ON T2.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = T3.SUB_DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T1.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID WHERE T4.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T3.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.DISTRICT_NAME,
    SUM(fmcc.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) AS total_maternity_child_welfare_centres
FROM DIM_STATE ds
JOIN DIM_DISTRICT d ON ds.STATE_ID = d.STATE_ID
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON d.DISTRICT_ID = sd.DISTRICT_ID
JOIN FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE fmcc ON sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = fmcc.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
WHERE ds.STATE_NAME ILIKE 'Andhra Pradesh'
GROUP BY d.DISTRICT_NAME
ORDER BY total_maternity_child_welfare_centres DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.DISTRICT_NAME,
    SUM(fmcc.NUMBER_OF_MATERNITY_AND_CHILD_WELFARE_CENTRES) AS total_maternity_child_welfare_centres
FROM DIM_STATE ds
JOIN DIM_DISTRICT d ON ds.STATE_ID = d.STATE_ID
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON d.DISTRICT_ID = sd.DISTRICT_ID
JOIN FACT_MATERNITY_CHILD_CARE fmcc ON sd.SUB_DISTRICT_ID = fmcc.SUB_DISTRICT_ID
WHERE ds.STATE_NAME ILIKE 'Andhra Pradesh'
GROUP BY d.DISTRICT_NAME
ORDER BY total_maternity_child_welfare_centres DESC
LIMIT 5;

JOIN DIM_COUNTRY c ON s.COUNTRY_ID = c.COUNTRY_ID
JOIN DIM_SUB_DISTRICT sd ON d.DISTRICT_ID = sd.DISTRICT_ID
